---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem or use case

What are you trying to do that Cogscope does not support well today?

## Proposed solution

Describe what you would like to see. Be specific if you can (CLI command, metric, adapter, etc.).

## Alternatives considered

Any workarounds or other tools you have tried?

## Additional context

Links, screenshots, or example traces/fingerprints.
